title: carex johnstonii
intro: Carex johnstonii, also known as Johnston's sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial plant native to New Zealand, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antifungal and antibacterial properties. Carex johnstonii is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to support skin and respiratory health.
